name: keepseek-architecture-guardian
description: KeepSeek architecture guardrails for module boundaries, ownership, and safe repository maintenance.

interface.longDescription: Use this plugin when planning, implementing, or reviewing KeepSeek changes that must respect the extension's architecture, ownership boundaries, and cross-module contracts.
defaultPrompt: Use $keepseek-architecture-guardian to plan this KeepSeek change.
Use $keepseek-architecture-guardian to check the module boundaries.
